mainEntity.name: How to measure AEO success for Chicago criminal defense attorneys?
mainEntity.text: How to measure AEO success for Chicago criminal defense attorneys?

acceptedAnswer.text: Track AI citations via tools like Ahrefs AI monitor, impression share in Perplexity/ChatGPT, and lead attribution from AI referrals for Chicago criminal cases.[3]

suggestedAnswer.text: Metrics include AI overview appearances, click-through from generative responses, and branded queries post-optimization. Use Google Analytics UTM for AI traffic. Chicago defense firms see ROI in high-intent queries; benchmark against competitors. False positives from vanity metrics mislead—focus on conversions.[1]
